description: Style NoteFor the fiery and hot-tempered, here's a pair of sandals to match your temperament. In brown and black, lotto's Riot sandals, inspired by the scorpion, look wonderful with jeans, bermudas or cargoes. Wear them with a bright tee.Product DetailsRound toed sandal with fabric thong straps and midfoot and ankle loop straps for added holdGrooved and soft footbed with branding at the heelMultidirectional lugs at the TPU outsoleMaterial and CareSynthetic, fabricDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
